name: Central Spiral Node
issue: Overlapping commuter, visitor, and lunch-time flows converge around the main circular path.
suggestion: Separate through movement from social staying areas and clarify the shortest route around the central node.

name: South Entrance Corridor
issue: The narrow north-south corridor receives repeated peak-hour flows from the primary south entrance.
suggestion: Widen the effective walking band, remove unnecessary edge obstacles, and create a parallel slow-stay strip.

name: East-West Transfer Link
issue: East gateway traffic and central users share the same diagonal path, creating path overlap.
suggestion: Use paving hierarchy, lighting, and planted buffers to split the fast diagonal route from optional resting edges.
